executive_summary: Strong month: revenue up, runway extended, and the flagship product shipped its first paying cohort. Two major decisions taken; top risks contained.

sections.heading: Risks
items: Acme master agreement auto-renews on unfavorable terms

sections.heading: Major Decisions
items: Approved the move to usage-based pricing

sections.heading: Capital Allocation
items: Reinvested 60% of new revenue into product
Held 18 months of runway in reserve

sections.heading: Legal / Compliance
items: SOC 2 Type II audit kicked off
Updated the DPA template for EU customers

next_30_60_90: 30 days: execute top sales motions toward the $420,000 weighted pipeline and close the highest-confidence deals.
60 days: act on the 2 major decision(s), advance product progress, and retire the top tracked risks.
90 days: address hiring needs, grow MRR beyond $84,000, and extend runway through disciplined capital allocation.
